name: garak (LLM Vulnerability Scanner)

auth.notes: Provider API keys for the model under test; OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.

performance.notes: Depends on LLM provider latency × number of probes; full scans take 10-60 minutes

agent_readiness.notes: LLM vulnerability scanner for AI red-teaming. Probes LLMs for: prompt injection, jailbreaks, hallucinations, toxicity, bias, data leakage, malware generation, misinformation. 50+ probe categories. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, Ollama, REST endpoints. CLI-first: `python -m garak -m openai -p promptinjection`. Generates HTML/JSON vulnerability reports. Used by AI security teams, red-teamers, and compliance validation. Part of NVIDIA's AI safety stack.

gotchas: False positives common — requires manual review of results
API costs can be high for comprehensive scans
best_when: AI red-teaming and security assessments of LLM systems
Automated jailbreak and prompt injection testing
Security research on language model vulnerabilities
avoid_when: Production continuous testing (API costs + false positive rate)
Teams without LLM security expertise to interpret results
Quick safety checks (promptfoo or simple evals faster)
summary: garak is NVIDIA's LLM vulnerability scanner for AI red-teaming. Probes LLMs for prompt injection, jailbreaks, hallucination, toxicity, bias, and data leakage across 50+ probe categories. CLI-driven with HTML/JSON reports. Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, and Ollama targets. Used for AI security assessments, compliance validation, and academic LLM safety research. Early-stage but comprehensive coverage of known LLM attack vectors.
